answer:
Orthodontic treatment is covered if a participating provider prepares a treatment plan prior to starting treatment, based on an examination showing a diagnosis of an abnormal occlusion that can be corrected by orthodontic treatment.

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Orthodontic Treatment | • Orthodontic treatment is covered only if the Participating Provider prepares the treatment plan prior to starting treatment. The treatment plan is based on an examination that must take place while you are covered under the plan. The examination must show a diagnosis of an abnormal occlusion that can be corrected by orthodontic treatment. • You must remain covered under the plan for the entire length of treatment. You must follow the post-treatment plan and keep all appointments after you are de-banded to avoid additional Copayments. • Copayments may be adjusted based upon the services necessary to complete the treatment if orthodontic treatment is started prior to the member’s effective date. • The Copayment may be prorated if coverage terminates prior to completion of treatment. The services necessary to complete treatment will be based on the Reasonable Cash Value after coverage terminates. • You are responsible for payment of the Copayments listed below for pre-orthodontic and orthodontic services. The Pre-Orthodontic Service Copayments will be credited towards the Orthodontic Service Copayment due if you accept the treatment plan. The Copayment for limited orthodontic treatment may be prorated based on the treatment plan. • The General Office Visit Copayment is charged at each visit for orthodontic treatment. Services provided in connection with orthodontic treatment are subject to the Service Copayments. • Pre-Orthodontic Service Copayment Initial orthodontic exam: $25 copay Study models and X-rays: $125 copay Case presentation: Covered in full • Orthodontic Service Copayment Comprehensive Orthodontic Service Copayment: $2,500 Copay The following orthodontic procedures are Covered Services under this benefit: D8020 Limited orthodontic treatment of the transitional dentition D8030 Limited orthodontic treatment of the adolescent dentition D8040 Limited orthodontic treatment of the adult dentition D8070 Comprehensive orthodontic treatment of the transitional dentition D8080 Comprehensive orthodontic treatment of the adolescent dentition D8090 Comprehensive orthodontic treatment of the adult dentition |
